mapper.sql: SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , USER_NAME , BOARD.CREATE_DATE , VIEWS
mapper.select: FROM BOARD JOIN SEMI_USER USING(USER_ID) WHERE BOARD.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD.CREATE_DATE ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
, BOARD_CONTENT FROM BOARD JOIN SEMI_USER USING(USER_ID) WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEWS = VIEWS +1 WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND ( USER_ID = #{userId} OR 'ROLE_ADMIN' = (SELECT ROLE FROM SEMI_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) )
mapper.select: , BOARD.STATUS FROM BOARD JOIN SEMI_USER USING(USER_ID) ORDER BY BOARD.CREATE_DATE ASC OFFSET #{pageInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageInfo.size} ROWS ONLY
